query: Select the best candidate for auditable LLM retrieval reranking with explicit rules and reproducible decision traces.

candidates.title: Rule-first retrieval reranking
candidates.text: Defines explicit comparison rules before scoring retrieval candidates. Produces rules.yaml, decision_matrix.json, selected_ids, and reproducible audit traces for LLM agents.

candidates.title: Fast summary generation
candidates.text: Summarizes long documents quickly and returns a concise answer, but does not preserve per-candidate selection evidence or deterministic replay artifacts.

candidates.title: Private cache shortcut
candidates.text: Uses a private token and secret cache to choose an answer without exposing rules or auditable scoring details.
